But the level is not completed. Maybe I need to match a different pattern, or maybe there's something else I need to do.

Let me compare:

- Top-right center: symmetric (grey corners)
- Bottom-left center: asymmetric (grey top/bottom)
- Bottom-right center: symmetric (grey top/bottom)
Wait, the bottom-right center piece has grey at (44,47) and (48,47), which is top and bottom. This is similar to the bottom-left center piece which has grey at (44,15) and (48,13).
But the top-right center piece has grey at (10,46), (10,50), (14,46), (14,50), which is all four corners.
So the bottom-right center piece is NOT the same as the top-right center piece. It's more similar to the bottom-left center piece.
